title: Peter McKenzie
text: Home * People * Peter McKenzie Peter McKenzie, WebDU 2009 [1] Peter McKenzie , a New Zealand computer scientist, and software engineer at Google [2] . As computer games programmer, Peter is author of the chess engines LambChop and Warp , and the Go playing engine Gonzo [3] . His Arimaa bot Jumbo competed in the 2015 World Championship [4] .
